name: sealos
description: Build, deploy, update, and troubleshoot apps on Sealos Cloud from Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Deploy and operate apps on Sealos Cloud.
interface.longDescription: Bring Sealos deployment workflows into Codex for app readiness checks, containerization, deployment preparation, in-place updates, and rollout verification.
defaultPrompt: Use Sealos to assess this repo for Sealos Cloud deployment readiness.
Use Sealos to prepare Docker and deployment artifacts for this app.
Use Sealos to update an existing Sealos deployment and verify rollout.
